descriptionInUI: Runtime for the enemy comms-jamming feature. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.commsJam (the 'Enemy comms jamming' setting is on, an enemy IADS comms/command-center node is alive, and blue has briefed channels). While at least one emitted C2 node is alive, the plugin transmits duty-cycled barrage noise (trigger.action.radioTransmission) on a rotating subset of the briefed blue channels from the node's map position -- real power/distance falloff, so the interference is worst deep in enemy territory and SRS users hear it through their cockpit-tuned radios. GUARD and ATC are never on the target list (filtered in Python by construction), and the kneeboard carries a JAM BACKUP channel the jammer never touches. Audio pressure ONLY: no force-model change, the plugin owns no kills -- destroying the C2 node (an ordinary IADS strike target, recorded natively) is what silences the jamming. Bursts begin only after a startup grace so nobody is jammed mid-alignment.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Burst length: noise transmission per jammed channel (s)
Channels stepped on per burst cycle
Transmitter power (W) -- range/strength of the interference
Startup grace before the first burst (s)
